creator: ejk@iki.fi
text:
Port mail/p5-Mail-SpamAssassin with option WITH_SPF_QUERY fails to install
unless net-mgmt/p5-NetAddr-IP is upgraded to version 4.00.7

How-To-Repeat: 
# cd ports/mail/p5-Mail-SpamAssassin && make all
# make install
===>  Installing for p5-Mail-SpamAssassin-3.2.1
===>   p5-Mail-SpamAssassin-3.2.1 depends on package: p5-Net-DNS>=0.58 - found
===>   p5-Mail-SpamAssassin-3.2.1 depends on package: p5-IO-Zlib>=1.04 - found
===>   p5-Mail-SpamAssassin-3.2.1 depends on package: p5-HTML-Parser>=3.43 - found
===>   p5-Mail-SpamAssassin-3.2.1 depends on package: p5-IO-Compress-Zlib>=2.04 - found
===>   p5-Mail-SpamAssassin-3.2.1 depends on package: p5-Compress-Zlib>=2.04 - found
===>   p5-Mail-SpamAssassin-3.2.1 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/Mail/Internet.pm - found
===>   p5-Mail-SpamAssassin-3.2.1 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/libcrypto.so.5 - found
===>   p5-Mail-SpamAssassin-3.2.1 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/perl5.8.8 - found
===>   p5-Mail-SpamAssassin-3.2.1 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/Bundle/LWP.pm - found
===>   p5-Mail-SpamAssassin-3.2.1 depends on package: p5-Archive-Tar>=1.23 - found
===>   p5-Mail-SpamAssassin-3.2.1 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/mach/Encode/Detect.pm - found
===>   p5-Mail-SpamAssassin-3.2.1 depends on package: p5-NetAddr-IP>=4.00.7 - not found
===>   Found p5-NetAddr-IP-4.00.4, but you need to upgrade to p5-NetAddr-IP>=4.00.7.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/mail/p5-Mail-SpamAssassin.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/mail/p5-Mail-SpamAssassin.
